digest_items.title: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
digest_items.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
digest_items.author: OpenCut-app
digest_items.summary_zh: OpenCut 是一款开源的视频编辑工具，旨在成为 CapCut 的替代品。它完全免费，支持多平台使用，用户无需付费即可获得强大的剪辑功能。对于想要摆脱商业软件限制的创作者来说，OpenCut 提供了极高的可定制性和透明度，让视频编辑更加自由。
digest_items.summary_en: OpenCut is an open-source video editor designed as a free alternative to CapCut. It offers powerful editing features without any subscription or watermark, making it ideal for content creators who want full control over their tools. The project is cross-platform and community-driven, ensuring transparency and continuous improvement. For anyone tired of paid video editors or restrictive platforms, OpenCut provides a flexible and privacy-respecting solution.

digest_items.title: ocornut/imgui
digest_items.description: Dear ImGui: Bloat-free Graphical User interface for C++ with minimal dependencies
digest_items.author: ocornut
digest_items.summary_zh: Dear ImGui是一个极简主义的C++图形用户界面库，几乎没有外部依赖，却能实现流畅的即时模式界面。它特别适合游戏开发工具、调试面板和实时数据可视化场景，因为开发者不需要复杂的UI框架就能快速构建交互界面。相比传统UI库，它更注重开发效率和灵活性，因此在独立游戏和工具链中广受欢迎。
digest_items.summary_en: Dear ImGui is a bloat-free graphical user interface library for C++ with minimal dependencies, offering a seamless immediate mode GUI experience. It is especially popular among game developers and tool builders who need quick, interactive panels for debugging or real-time data visualization without the overhead of traditional UI frameworks. Its focus on simplicity and performance makes it a go-to choice for indie games and embedded tools.

digest_items.title: chrislgarry/Apollo-11
digest_items.description: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.
digest_items.author: chrislgarry
digest_items.summary_zh: 阿波罗11号导航计算机的原始源码被上传到GitHub，引发了技术怀旧热潮。这份代码记录了人类首次登月所用制导系统的核心逻辑，包括指令舱和登月模块的双重任务分配。对于科技史爱好者和程序员来说，这是一个独特的窗口，能够窥见当年用精简指令和磁芯内存完成航天计算的智慧。它不仅是历史文档，更是早期嵌入式系统风格的典型示范。
digest_items.summary_en: The original Apollo Guidance Computer source code was uploaded to GitHub, sparking a wave of tech nostalgia. This code represents the core logic behind the first moon landing navigation system, including both the command and lunar modules. For history enthusiasts and programmers, it offers a unique glimpse into how early engineers achieved spaceflight computing with minimal instructions and core memory. It's not just a historical artifact but a showcase of classic embedded system design.

digest_items.title: koala73/worldmonitor
digest_items.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
digest_items.author: koala73
digest_items.summary_zh: koala73/worldmonitor 是一个开源实时全球情报仪表盘，它通过人工智能技术聚合新闻、监控地缘政治动态并追踪基础设施状况，为决策者提供统一态势感知。这款工具特别适合需要快速掌握全球局势的记者、分析师或应急管理人员，帮助他们在海量信息中理清脉络。
digest_items.summary_en: koala73/worldmonitor is an open source real-time global intelligence dashboard that leverages AI to aggregate news, monitor geopolitical shifts, and track infrastructure status in a single situational awareness interface. It‘s designed for journalists, analysts, and emergency responders who need to quickly grasp complex global events and make informed decisions from scattered data.

digest_items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
digest_items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
digest_items.author: asgeirtj
digest_items.summary_zh: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks 是一个 GitHub 项目，它收集了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 多个大模型的系统提示词，包括 Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking 等。这些提示词揭示了模型背后如何被引导、如何设定角色和限制，对 AI 研究者和开发者理解模型行为非常有价值。它引发了关于提示工程和模型安全边界的讨论，也是窥探顶级 AI 内部设计的一个窗口。
digest_items.summary_en: This GitHub repository compiles leaked system prompts from popular AI models like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. By exposing the hidden instructions that shape how these models behave, it offers rare insight into prompt engineering, safety guardrails, and role-setting techniques. AI researchers and developers can learn how top models are orchestrated, but the leak also raises important questions about access control and intellectual property in the generative AI race.

digest_items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
digest_items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
digest_items.author: Panniantong
digest_items.summary_zh: Agent-Reach是一个命令行工具，让AI代理能够直接“看到”整个互联网。它支持读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书等主流平台，而且不需要任何API费用。对于开发AI代理的人来说，最大的痛点就是如何让代理获取实时、跨平台的信息，这款工具通过简单的CLI命令就解决了这个问题。无论是做社交媒体分析、技术趋势追踪还是内容聚合，开发者都可以零成本地为自己的AI装上“眼睛”。
digest_items.summary_en: Agent-Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents the ability to 'see' the entire internet. It enables reading and searching across major platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu — all without any API fees. The biggest pain point for AI agent developers is getting real-time, cross-platform data; Agent-Reach solves this with a single command. Whether you're building a social media analyzer, a tech trend tracker, or a content aggregator, you can now equip your AI with 'eyes' at zero cost. It's a game-changer for hobbyists and startups who previously had to rely on expensive or rate-limited APIs.

digest_items.title: usestrix/strix
digest_items.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
digest_items.author: usestrix
digest_items.summary_zh: Strix是一款开源的AI渗透测试工具，能够自动扫描并修复应用中的安全漏洞。它利用人工智能模拟攻击行为，帮助开发者在早期发现潜在风险，大幅提升安全检测效率。对于缺乏专业安全团队的初创公司和个人开发者来说，Strix提供了一种低成本、高效率的防护方案，让应用安全不再成为短板。
digest_items.summary_en: Strix is an open-source AI-powered penetration testing tool designed to automatically identify and fix vulnerabilities in applications. By simulating cyber attacks with artificial intelligence, it helps developers catch security flaws early in the development cycle, significantly reducing manual effort and cost. This tool is particularly valuable for startups and individual developers who lack dedicated security teams, offering a practical way to strengthen app security without complex infrastructure. Its open-source nature also allows the community to contribute and customize it for specific needs.

digest_items.title: calesthio/OpenMontage
digest_items.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
digest_items.author: calesthio
digest_items.summary_zh: OpenMontage 是首个开源智能体视频制作系统，拥有 12 条流水线、52 个工具和 500 多种智能体技能，可以把你的 AI 编程助手变成一个完整的视频制作团队。它解决了传统视频制作流程复杂、门槛高的问题，通过智能体自动完成脚本、剪辑、配音、特效等任务，让任何人都能快速生成专业视频。对内容创作者、营销人员和开发者来说，这意味着不需要专业设备或团队，只用自然语言描述就能产出高质量视频，极大降低了视频制作的门槛和成本。
digest_items.summary_en: OpenMontage is the world's first open-source, agentic video production system, featuring 12 pipelines, 52 tools, and over 500 agent skills. It transforms your AI coding assistant into a full-fledged video production studio, automating tasks like scriptwriting, editing, voiceover, and effects. This solves the complexity and high cost of traditional video creation, enabling anyone to produce professional videos using natural language commands. Content creators, marketers, and developers benefit from a streamlined workflow that eliminates the need for specialized hardware or teams. It's a game-changer for democratizing video production, making it as simple as talking to an AI.

digest_items.title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
digest_items.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.
digest_items.author: DioxusLabs
digest_items.summary_zh: Dioxus 是一个用 Rust 编写的全栈应用框架，旨在替代 React 在桌面、Web 和移动端的开发体验。它利用 Rust 的安全性和性能优势，同时支持类似 React 的声明式 UI 编写方式。最吸引人的是它允许同一套代码运行在多个平台，包括原生桌面和移动应用，这对追求跨平台一致性和高性能的 Rust 开发者来说是一个极具潜力的工具。
digest_items.summary_en: Dioxus is a full-stack app framework written in Rust, aiming to replace React for desktop, web, and mobile development. It leverages Rust's safety and performance while offering a React-like declarative UI writing experience. Most notably, it allows the same codebase to run on multiple platforms including native desktop and mobile apps, making it a powerful tool for Rust developers seeking cross-platform consistency and high performance.

digest_items.title: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
digest_items.description: AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨
digest_items.author: AstrBotDevs
digest_items.summary_zh: AstrBot 是一个 AI 智能体助手兼开发框架，集成了大量即时通讯平台、大语言模型、插件和 AI 功能，旨在成为类似 openclaw 的替代方案。它让开发者可以快速搭建跨平台的 AI 助手，支持灵活的插件扩展和多模型切换。对于想要在微信、Discord 等渠道部署智能对话机器人或自动化工作流的团队，这是一个开箱即用的高效方案。
digest_items.summary_en: AstrBot is an AI agent assistant and development framework that integrates numerous IM platforms, large language models, plugins, and AI features, positioning itself as an alternative to openclaw. It enables developers to quickly build cross-platform AI assistants with flexible plugin extensions and multi-model switching. For teams looking to deploy intelligent chatbots or automated workflows on WeChat, Discord, and other channels, it provides an out-of-the-box efficient solution.

digest_items.title: 谷歌密谋「焊死」Gemini，神秘芯片曝光，能效碾压TPU十倍
digest_items.summary_zh: 谷歌被曝正在秘密研发一款专为 Gemini 模型优化的人工智能芯片，其能效据称达到了现有 TPU 的十倍。这款神秘芯片的设计目标是“焊死”在 Gemini 上，实现软硬件深度绑定，从而大幅降低推理成本并提升性能。如果消息属实，这将改变 AI 芯片市场的格局，尤其对大规模部署 Gemini 应用的企业来说，意味着更低的运营成本和更强的竞争力。
digest_items.summary_en: Google is reportedly secretly developing a custom AI chip specifically optimized for its Gemini model, claiming energy efficiency ten times that of current TPUs. This mysterious chip aims to tightly couple hardware and software with Gemini, significantly reducing inference costs and boosting performance. If true, this could reshape the AI chip landscape, especially for enterprises deploying Gemini at scale, offering lower operational costs and stronger competitiveness.

digest_items.title: 8点1氪丨怡颗莓回应“检出致癌物”；美团否认上线“本科专送”“硕士优送”等配送服务；美方喊话三星电子、SK海力士分享超额利润
digest_items.summary_zh: 今日多项热点：怡颗莓就“检出致癌物”事件作出回应，否认产品存在安全问题；美团否认推出“本科专送”“硕士优送”等分类配送服务，称传闻系谣言；美国方面则向三星电子和 SK 海力士施压，要求其分享因芯片市场波动获得的超额利润。这些动态分别涉及食品安全、劳动力歧视和国际贸易博弈，各自引发广泛关注。
digest_items.summary_en: Today's hot topics: Berry & Berry responded to claims of detecting carcinogens in their products, denying any safety issues. Meituan denied launching delivery services labeled as 'Bachelor's Degree Exclusive' or 'Master's Degree Premium', calling them rumors. The U.S. government urged Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix to share excess profits from chip market fluctuations. These developments touch on food safety, labor discrimination, and international trade dynamics, each sparking widespread attention.

digest_items.title: 黄仁勋的“达链”闭环了
digest_items.summary_zh: 黄仁勋的'达链'闭环了，指的是英伟达从芯片设计到AI数据中心的全栈生态终于打通。过去依赖外部代工和软件适配，如今英伟达自研CPU、GPU、网络和软件平台，形成完整供应链闭环。这对数据中心客户意味着更高效的部署和更低的总拥有成本，但也让竞争对手难以复制其一体化优势。
digest_items.summary_en: Jensen Huang's 'DA Chain' has closed the loop, referring to NVIDIA's achievement of a full-stack ecosystem from chip design to AI data centers. Previously reliant on external foundries and software adaptation, NVIDIA now integrates its own CPUs, GPUs, networking, and software platform into a seamless supply chain. This gives data center customers more efficient deployment and lower total cost of ownership, while making it harder for competitors to replicate such integrated advantages.

digest_items.title: 沿用DeepSeek架构，美国大模型开始抄中国作业
digest_items.summary_zh: 美国大模型开始借鉴DeepSeek的架构，标志着中国AI技术路线首次被海外主流团队效仿。DeepSeek通过稀疏注意力、MoE优化等创新，在保持性能的同时大幅降低训练成本。如今美国团队直接沿用其设计，说明中国在开源大模型领域的创新已获得国际认可，也意味着AI竞争从拼算力转向拼架构效率。
digest_items.summary_en: American large language models are now adopting DeepSeek's architecture, marking the first time a Chinese AI technical approach has been emulated by mainstream overseas teams. DeepSeek's innovations in sparse attention and MoE optimization significantly cut training costs while maintaining performance. The fact that US teams are directly replicating this design shows that China's open-source AI innovation has gained international recognition, shifting the competition from raw compute power to architectural efficiency.

digest_items.title: 磁吸背屏扎堆来了：影石海信卖功能，OPPO荣耀做情绪搭子
digest_items.summary_zh: 磁吸背屏手机突然流行起来，但各家玩法完全不同：影石和海信更强调实用功能，比如用背屏显示信息或辅助拍摄；而OPPO和荣耀则把背屏做成情感化的'情绪搭子'，可以显示动态表情、天气或自定义动画。这种差异化说明厂商正在探索如何用第二块屏幕创造社交价值和用户粘性，而不仅仅是堆砌硬件。
digest_items.summary_en: Magnetic back-screen phones are suddenly all the rage, but each brand takes a different approach. Insta360 and Hisense focus on practicality—using the back screen for information display or camera assistance. OPPO and Honor, on the other hand, treat it as an 'emotional companion' that shows animated emojis, weather, or custom animations. This divergence shows manufacturers are exploring how a second screen can create social value and user stickiness beyond sheer hardware gimmicks.

digest_items.title: 欧林生物：重庆啤酒的痛，市场还没忘记
digest_items.summary_zh: 欧林生物近期受到市场关注，但投资者仍对'重庆啤酒的痛'记忆犹新。当年重庆啤酒因乙肝疫苗研发失败股价暴跌，如今欧林生物同样押注创新疫苗，市场担心历史重演。尽管欧林在破伤风疫苗等领域有优势，但核心管线的不确定性让股民难以释怀，提醒生物科技投资要警惕单产品依赖风险。
digest_items.summary_en: Olym Bio has caught market attention recently, but investors haven't forgotten 'Chongqing Beer's pain'. That company saw its stock crash after a hepatitis B vaccine failure. Now Olym Bio is also betting big on innovative vaccines, and the market worries history might repeat. Despite Olym's strengths in tetanus vaccines, the uncertainty around its core pipeline keeps shareholders uneasy—a cautionary tale about single-product risk in biotech investing.

digest_items.title: 让张益唐苦熬7年的雅可比猜想，Fable 5竟一夜推翻证伪
digest_items.summary_zh: 困扰数学家张益唐七年的雅可比猜想，竟被名为Fable 5的AI工具在一夜之间推翻证伪。Fable 5通过自动推理和搜索反例，发现该猜想在特定条件下不成立，直接终结了多年的学术争议。这件事让数学界既震惊又兴奋——AI不仅能辅助证明，还能彻底否定经典猜想，预示着计算数学工具将在理论发现中扮演更激进的角色。
digest_items.summary_en: The Jacobian Conjecture, which tormented mathematician Yitang Zhang for seven years, was overturned and falsified overnight by an AI tool called Fable 5. Using automated reasoning and counterexample search, Fable 5 found that the conjecture fails under certain conditions, ending years of academic debate. The mathematics community is both shocked and thrilled—AI not only assists in proofs but can now outright debunk classic conjectures, signaling that computational tools will play an even more aggressive role in theoretical discovery.

digest_items.title: 日本，缘何成为中国新茶饮“滑铁卢”？
digest_items.summary_zh: 中国新茶饮品牌赴日开店曾引发热潮，但如今却纷纷遭遇滑铁卢。日本市场消费习惯保守、本土饮品竞争激烈，加之品牌溢价不被接受，导致这些茶饮品牌难以盈利。这个现象揭示了跨界出海时文化适配和本地化策略的重要性，也给其他计划出海的消费品牌敲响了警钟。
digest_items.summary_en: Chinese new-style tea brands expanded into Japan with high hopes, only to face a Waterloo. Conservative consumer habits, fierce competition from established local drinks, and a rejection of premium pricing have made profitability elusive. This serves as a cautionary tale about the critical need for cultural adaptation and localization strategies when Chinese consumer brands venture overseas.

digest_items.title: 数码圈「跳水王」来了，手机电脑疯涨，相机价格却崩了
digest_items.summary_zh: 数码产品市场出现罕见分化：手机和电脑因芯片短缺和原材料涨价而价格飞涨，但相机市场却因为手机摄影的冲击和需求萎缩而价格雪崩。对消费者而言，现在入手相机是抄底的好时机，而买手机电脑则要多掏钱。这种价格倒挂背后是技术迭代和消费习惯的深刻变革。
digest_items.summary_en: The electronics market is seeing a peculiar divergence: smartphones and PCs are skyrocketing in price due to chip shortages and rising component costs, while cameras are crashing in value as smartphone photography eats their lunch. For consumers, it's a great time to buy a camera bargain but a painful one for phones or laptops. This price inversion reflects deep shifts in technology cycles and consumer behavior.

digest_items.title: 谷歌Gemini 4开跑了，一夜三连发
digest_items.summary_zh: 谷歌连夜发布Gemini 4系列模型，一口气推出Ultra、Pro和Nano三个版本，覆盖从云端到端侧的全场景。新模型在推理、多模态能力上大幅提升，并开始集成到谷歌搜索和办公套件中。这意味着AI助手将变得更聪明、更实时，开发者也能基于此构建更强大的应用，AI竞争进入新阶段。
digest_items.summary_en: Google dropped the Gemini 4 family overnight, releasing three models — Ultra, Pro, and Nano — spanning cloud to on-device. These models boast major leaps in reasoning and multimodal capabilities, and are already being integrated into Google Search and Workspace. This means AI assistants are about to get smarter and more real-time, and developers have a new foundation for powerful apps. The AI race just shifted gears.

digest_items.title: 专访孙元浩：乘坐星环号，把数据库“移民火星”的人
digest_items.summary_zh: 专访星环科技创始人孙元浩，他提出了“数据库移民火星”的构想，即将传统数据库系统迁移到更先进、云原生的架构上，就像人类移民火星一样是一次彻底的升级。孙元浩分享了星环科技在分布式数据库、数据云等领域的创新实践，以及如何帮助企业平滑实现数据基础设施的现代化转型。这篇文章不仅揭示了技术路线，也探讨了中国数据库产业弯道超车的可能性。
digest_items.summary_en: In this interview, Sun Yuanhao, founder of Transwarp, discusses his vision of 'migrating databases to Mars' — a metaphor for moving legacy database systems to modern, cloud-native architectures. He explains Transwarp's innovations in distributed databases and data cloud platforms, and how they help enterprises smoothly transition their data infrastructure. The piece highlights China's growing ambition in database technology and offers insights into how domestic companies can leapfrog traditional solutions, making it valuable for anyone following global database trends.

digest_items.title: 业务研发中的 Loop Engineering：基于事前-事中-事后架构的实践｜AICon深圳
digest_items.summary_zh: Loop Engineering提出一种新颖的业务研发方法，将系统故障处理划分为事前预防、事中响应和事后复盘三个阶段。通过在每个环节嵌入自动化检测、隔离和恢复机制，能显著降低故障对业务的影响。这个架构特别适合追求高可用和快速迭代的互联网团队，它让稳定性不再靠人工加班，而是成为一种系统工程能力。
digest_items.summary_en: Loop Engineering introduces a novel approach to business development by structuring fault handling into three phases: before (prevention), during (response), and after (review). By embedding automated detection, isolation, and recovery into each stage, it dramatically reduces the impact of failures on operations. This architecture is ideal for internet teams chasing high availability and fast iteration, turning reliability from a manual firefight into an engineering discipline.

digest_items.title: 无问芯穹夏立雪：数字世界与物理世界的所有AI生产力运行，都需要 Agentic Infra
digest_items.summary_zh: 无问芯穹提出Agentic Infra的概念，认为未来的AI生产力要无缝打通数字世界和物理世界，必须依赖这样的智能基础设施。它提供统一的算力调度、数据管理和智能体编排能力，让机器人、自动驾驶和工业AI等应用能够高效协作。这不仅是技术栈的升级，更是AI从单点应用迈向全场景自动化的关键底座。
digest_items.summary_en: Infinite Foundry puts forward the concept of Agentic Infra, arguing that all AI productivity spanning the digital and physical worlds requires such an intelligent infrastructure. It unifies compute orchestration, data management, and agent coordination, enabling robots, autonomous driving, and industrial AI to collaborate efficiently. This isn't just a tech stack upgrade — it's the foundational layer that moves AI from isolated applications to full-scenario automation.

digest_items.title: 国产GPU分水岭时刻：当别家还在卷参数，摩尔线程早已训练出了世界模型
digest_items.summary_zh: 摩尔线程国产GPU成功训练出世界模型，标志着国产GPU行业从单纯参数竞赛转向实际应用能力的分水岭。当其他厂商还在比拼硬件参数时，摩尔线程已经实现了AI大模型训练的真实突破，对于推动国产AI生态发展和算力自主可控具有里程碑意义。
digest_items.summary_en: Moore Threads has trained a world model using its domestic GPU, marking a watershed moment for the Chinese GPU industry. While competitors are still competing on hardware specifications, Moore Threads has demonstrated real-world AI training capability. This breakthrough shows that domestic GPUs can handle advanced AI workloads, which is critical for building a self-sufficient AI ecosystem and reducing dependence on foreign chips.

digest_items.title: 神州数码发布企业AI流程系统与智算产品，尝试打通应用和算力两端
digest_items.summary_zh: 神州数码推出企业AI流程系统和智算产品，致力于打通AI应用与算力资源之间的壁垒。该方案帮助企业简化AI部署流程、优化算力使用效率，降低了企业应用AI的技术门槛和成本，对于推动企业数字化智能化转型具有实际价值。
digest_items.summary_en: Digital China has launched an enterprise AI workflow system and intelligent computing products, aiming to connect AI applications with computing power resources. The solution simplifies AI deployment and optimizes resource utilization, lowering the technical barriers and costs for enterprises to adopt AI. This move accelerates digital and intelligent transformation for businesses of all sizes.

digest_items.title: 亚马逊云科技概要介绍了某客户如何将 Lambda 函数扩展至 100 万个
digest_items.summary_zh: 亚马逊云科技分享了一个客户案例，详细描述了如何将AWS Lambda函数扩展至100万个并发实例。该案例展示了无服务器架构在超大规模弹性扩展方面的实践方法，为需要处理海量请求或突发流量的开发者提供了宝贵的参考，证明了Lambda在生产环境中的极限能力。
digest_items.summary_en: AWS outlined how a customer scaled its Lambda functions to 1 million concurrent executions. The case study demonstrates the extreme elasticity of serverless computing and provides practical insights into handling massive workloads. It serves as a valuable reference for developers building highly scalable applications, showing that Lambda can handle unprecedented traffic spikes while maintaining performance and cost efficiency.

digest_items.title: 开源如何促进平台构建过程中的协作
digest_items.summary_zh: 文章探讨了开源模式在平台工程中的重要作用，说明开源如何促进跨团队协作、共享组件和最佳实践。通过开源，团队可以避免重复造轮子，加速平台构建，并借助社区智慧持续改进系统。这对于平台工程师和DevOps团队提升开发效率和创新能力具有实际意义。
digest_items.summary_en: This article explores how open source fosters collaboration in platform engineering. By sharing components, best practices, and code, teams can avoid reinventing the wheel and build platforms faster. Open source enables cross-team cooperation and leverages community contributions to improve systems. This approach is especially beneficial for platform engineers and DevOps teams aiming to accelerate development and innovate more efficiently.

digest_items.title: OpenAI 将崩溃调试视为流行病学研究，修复了存在 18 之久年的 GNU libunwind 漏洞
digest_items.summary_zh: OpenAI在调试系统崩溃时，创新地采用类似流行病学的研究方法进行根因分析，最终发现并修复了GNU libunwind库中一个存在18年的漏洞。这一过程展示了将系统调试与数据分析相结合的独特思路，对于软件开发者具有启发意义，也强调了开源社区合作修复关键底层漏洞的重要性。
digest_items.summary_en: OpenAI treated a crash debugging process like an epidemiological investigation, ultimately identifying and fixing an 18-year-old bug in GNU libunwind. This creative approach combined system debugging with data analysis, offering a fascinating lesson for software developers. The fix benefits the entire open source community by addressing a long-standing vulnerability in a widely used library, highlighting the value of rigorous debugging methods and cross-team collaboration.

digest_items.title: 龙虾之父一条推文，Loop 时代终结？
digest_items.summary_zh: 龙虾之父的一条推文引发了技术圈的震荡，暗示着曾风靡一时的 Loop 框架可能走向终结。作为早期微服务架构的倡导者，Loop 一度被众多开发者追捧，但如今创始人的公开表态让社区陷入迷茫。这一事件让人们重新思考框架过度依赖单一灵魂人物的风险，也提醒我们在技术选型时需更加审慎。
digest_items.summary_en: A single tweet from the 'father of Lobster' has sent shockwaves through the tech community, hinting at the possible end of the Loop framework. Loop, once a darling of microservices architecture, enjoyed widespread adoption, but its creator's public remarks now leave developers uncertain. This incident underscores the risks of relying too heavily on a single visionary in open-source projects and prompts teams to rethink their framework dependencies and long-term viability.

digest_items.title: Java 近期新闻：TornadoVM 5、JHipster、Google ADK、OmniFish Build of Payara、Vidocq 发布
digest_items.summary_zh: 本期 Java 新闻汇总了多个重要更新：TornadoVM 5 带来 GPU 加速改进，JHipster 推出新版本简化微服务搭建，Google ADK 发布助力 Android 开发，OmniFish 带来 Payara 社区构建版，以及 Vidocq 工具的正式发布。这些更新涵盖了性能优化、开发效率提升和生态扩展，对于 Java 开发者来说是值得关注的一轮技术迭代。
digest_items.summary_en: This Java news roundup covers key updates: TornadoVM 5 improves GPU acceleration for Java; JHipster delivers a new release to streamline microservice scaffolding; Google ADK launches to assist Android development; OmniFish introduces a community build of Payara; and Vidocq tool goes official. These releases collectively boost performance, developer productivity, and ecosystem expansion, making them essential reads for Java developers tracking the latest tooling and runtime advances.

digest_items.title: Show HN: I replaced a $120k bowling center system with $1,600 in ESP32s
digest_items.author: section33
digest_items.summary_zh: 一位开发者用总价仅1600美元的ESP32微控制器，成功替代了原本价值12万美元的保龄球中心管理系统。这个项目展示了如何利用低成本硬件和巧妙的软件设计，实现计分、传感器联动和用户管理等核心功能。对于小型保龄球馆经营者或喜欢DIY的嵌入式爱好者来说，这是一个极具启发性的低成本自动化改造案例。
digest_items.summary_en: A developer replaced a $120,000 bowling center management system with just $1,600 worth of ESP32 microcontrollers. The project demonstrates how low-cost hardware and clever software design can handle core functions like scoring, sensor integration, and user management. For small bowling alley operators or embedded systems enthusiasts, this is an inspiring example of how to achieve professional-grade automation on a shoestring budget.

digest_items.title: China’s open-weights AI strategy is winning
digest_items.author: benwerd
digest_items.summary_zh: 文章指出，中国通过大力推行开放权重的AI模型策略正在全球竞争中占据优势。与美国公司倾向于闭源模型不同，中国企业如阿里巴巴、百度等积极开源其大语言模型，允许开发者自由使用和修改。这种策略迅速吸引了大量社区贡献和应用落地，加速了AI技术普及和创新。对于中小企业和开发者而言，开放权重意味着更低成本和更强的定制灵活性，从而可能重塑全球AI生态格局。
digest_items.summary_en: This analysis argues that China's strategy of releasing open-weight AI models is proving to be a winning approach against the more closed models preferred by many US companies. By openly sharing weights of powerful large language models, Chinese firms like Alibaba and Baidu attract global developers who can fine-tune and deploy these models freely. This accelerates innovation and adoption, lowers barriers for small businesses and researchers, and could shift the balance of AI power. The piece offers a compelling case for why openness may triumph in the long run.

digest_items.title: Qwen 3.8
digest_items.author: nh43215rgb
digest_items.summary_zh: 阿里发布的Qwen 3.8是通义千问系列最新开源大模型，拥有超过380亿参数，在数学推理、代码生成和多语言理解等任务上实现了显著提升。相比前代版本，它推理速度更快，对中文英文的兼容性更强，同时保持了开源可部署的特点。对于需要本地部署或定制化AI能力的开发者、研究员和企业来说，Qwen 3.8提供了一个高性能且灵活性很高的选择，尤其适合构建智能助手、内容生成和数据分析类应用。
digest_items.summary_en: Qwen 3.8 is the latest open-source large language model from Alibaba's Qwen family, boasting over 38 billion parameters. It delivers significant improvements in mathematical reasoning, code generation, and multilingual comprehension, with faster inference speed and stronger support for both Chinese and English. Because it remains fully open-source, developers, researchers, and enterprises can deploy it locally or fine-tune it for customized tasks. This makes Qwen 3.8 a compelling choice for building intelligent assistants, content generators, and data analysis tools, especially for those who need high performance without relying on proprietary cloud APIs.

digest_items.title: Who's afraid of Chinese models?
digest_items.author: mfiguiere
digest_items.summary_zh: 一篇讨论引发了关于中国 AI 模型是否值得担忧的辩论。随着 DeepSeek 等国产模型在国际上崭露头角，一些人开始担心数据隐私和安全问题，但也有人认为这只是技术竞争的自然结果。文章指出，过度恐惧可能并非必要，关键是要基于事实而非情绪来评估风险，同时关注开源与合作带来的机遇。
digest_items.summary_en: A Hacker News discussion explores whether Chinese AI models should be feared. As models like DeepSeek gain international traction, concerns about data privacy and security emerge. However, some argue this is just normal tech competition. The piece suggests that overblown fear is unwarranted, urging a fact-based risk assessment instead of emotional reactions, while highlighting opportunities from open-source collaboration and global innovation.

digest_items.title: OpenSEO
digest_items.description: The open source Ahrefs alternative
digest_items.summary_zh: OpenSEO是一款开源的SEO分析工具，被称作Ahrefs的免费替代品。它提供了网站爬取、关键词研究、外链分析和排名跟踪等核心功能，所有数据都存储在本地，无需订阅付费服务。对于中小企业主、独立博主以及预算有限的网络营销人员来说，OpenSEO让他们能够以零成本获得专业级的搜索引擎优化洞察，帮助他们发现内容机会、监控竞争对手并提升网站流量。开源社区的支持也确保了工具的持续更新和功能扩展。
digest_items.summary_en: OpenSEO is an open-source SEO toolkit marketed as a free alternative to Ahrefs. It includes website crawling, keyword research, backlink analysis, and rank tracking, all running locally so no subscription or third-party service is needed. This empowers small business owners, independent bloggers, and budget-conscious marketers to access professional-level SEO insights at zero cost, helping them discover content opportunities, monitor competitors, and boost organic traffic. Because the community drives its development, OpenSEO is continuously improved and extended, making it a practical choice for those who want full control over their SEO data without recurring fees.

digest_items.title: Airport Simulator
digest_items.author: apunen
digest_items.summary_zh: 这个名为Airport Simulator的项目是一个高度真实的机场运营模拟工具，玩家或学习者可以扮演机场管理者，统筹航班调度、跑道分配、登机口管理、行李处理等复杂任务。它不仅是一个游戏，更是一个用于航空管理培训的教学平台。其精细的物理模型和实时决策挑战让用户沉浸式体验机场日常运行的紧张与协作。对于航空爱好者和专业人士来说，这是一款兼具趣味和教育意义的模拟器。
digest_items.summary_en: Airport Simulator is a detailed simulation tool that puts you in charge of a busy airport, managing everything from flight scheduling and runway allocation to gate assignments and baggage handling. More than just a game, it serves as an educational platform for aviation management, offering realistic physics and real-time decision-making challenges. Users get an immersive look into the coordination and pressure behind airport operations. It's a valuable resource for aviation enthusiasts, students, and professionals seeking a hands-on understanding of the complex systems that keep airports running.

digest_items.title: Claude Fable produced a counterexample to the Jacobian Conjecture
digest_items.author: loubbrad
digest_items.summary_zh: Anthropic的Claude模型在名为Fable的实验框架下，成功构造了雅可比猜想的一个反例。雅可比猜想是代数几何中一个长期未解决的难题，其正确性已经在多个特例下被证明，但一直缺少一个普适的反例。Claude Fable通过符号推理和创造性构造，给出了一个看似有效的具体函数，如果被验证成立，将是数学界的里程碑。这一成果也展示了先进AI不仅擅长语言任务，还能在严谨的数学前沿发现新知。
digest_items.summary_en: Claude, under a framework called Fable, has reportedly produced a counterexample to the Jacobian Conjecture, a long-standing open problem in algebraic geometry. The conjecture asserts that a polynomial map with non-zero constant Jacobian is invertible, and despite many partial proofs, no general counterexample had been found. Claude's construction, if validated, would be a significant mathematical breakthrough. This news also highlights how advanced AI models can contribute to frontier research by generating novel mathematical structures, potentially accelerating discovery in theoretical fields.

digest_items.title: Hacker wipes Romania's land registry database
digest_items.author: speckx
digest_items.summary_zh: 一名黑客成功入侵罗马尼亚的国家土地登记系统，并删除了整个数据库，导致数百万条土地所有权记录丢失。这次攻击不仅影响了政府运作，还给房地产交易和产权认证带来了巨大混乱。安全专家警告，此类针对关键基础设施的破坏性攻击正变得越来越普遍，各国需要加强网络安全防御体系。
digest_items.summary_en: A hacker infiltrated Romania's national land registry system and wiped the entire database, causing the loss of millions of land ownership records. The attack disrupted government operations and plunged real estate transactions and title verification into chaos. Security experts warn that such destructive attacks on critical infrastructure are becoming more common, highlighting the urgent need for stronger cybersecurity measures worldwide.

digest_items.title: OpenAI and Hugging Face address security incident during model evaluation
digest_items.author: mfiguiere
digest_items.summary_zh: OpenAI 与 Hugging Face 联合披露了一起在模型评估过程中发现的安全事件，涉及潜在的数据泄露风险。两家公司迅速响应，修补了漏洞并加强了评估流程的防护措施。这一事件突显了 AI 模型评估环节的安全性不容忽视，特别是在第三方协作和开放测试环境中，更需要建立严格的安全审查机制。
digest_items.summary_en: OpenAI and Hugging Face disclosed a security incident that occurred during a model evaluation, involving potential data exposure risks. Both companies responded quickly, patching the vulnerability and reinforcing security protocols in the evaluation pipeline. This incident highlights that AI model evaluation stages are not immune to attacks, especially in collaborative and open-testing environments, underscoring the need for rigorous security review processes to protect sensitive data.

digest_items.title: Kimi Work
digest_items.author: ms7892
digest_items.summary_zh: Kimi Work是一款面向职场团队的协作效率工具，它将任务管理、日程同步与即时通讯功能融为一体，帮助团队减少信息孤岛。其亮点在于智能化的优先级排序和自动化工作流，尤其适合远程办公团队或需要跨部门协作的场景。
digest_items.summary_en: Kimi Work is a productivity platform designed for workplace teams, combining task management, calendar sync, and instant messaging to reduce information silos. Its standout feature is intelligent priority sorting and automated workflows, making it ideal for remote teams or cross-department collaboration scenarios.

digest_items.title: Jelly UI: Soft-body physics for native HTML form controls
digest_items.author: baldvinmar
digest_items.summary_zh: Jelly UI是一个为原生HTML表单控件添加软体物理效果的开源库，让输入框、按钮等元素在交互时产生弹性形变和自然回弹。它提升了表单操作的趣味性与反馈感，开发者无需复杂代码就能实现类似Apple Vision Pro风格的动态界面。
digest_items.summary_en: Jelly UI is an open-source library that adds soft-body physics to native HTML form controls, making inputs and buttons exhibit elastic deformation and natural bounce on interaction. It enhances the fun and feedback of form actions, allowing developers to create Apple Vision Pro-style dynamic interfaces without complex code.

digest_items.title: Fuzzy AI
digest_items.description: We warm your prospects before reaching out
digest_items.summary_zh: Fuzzy AI 是一款销售预热工具，它能在你主动联系潜在客户之前，先通过AI与对方进行自然对话，逐步建立兴趣和信任。解决了冷接触效率低下的痛点是最大亮点，特别是对于B2B销售团队来说，Fuzzy AI 让第一次正式沟通不再尴尬，大幅提高回复率和转化率。
digest_items.summary_en: Fuzzy AI is a prospect warming tool that uses artificial intelligence to engage potential customers in natural conversations before you reach out. It solves the problem of cold outreach by building interest and trust gradually, making the first touchpoint more effective. B2B sales teams benefit most, as Fuzzy AI transforms awkward cold emails into warm, welcomed interactions, significantly boosting reply rates and conversions.

digest_items.title: Loova Ads Studio
digest_items.description: Create AI ads that convert, not just look good
digest_items.summary_zh: Loova Ads Studio 是一个用AI生成广告的工具，但它的特别之处在于不只追求视觉好看，而是围绕转化率来优化创意。它会自动测试多种文案、图像和受众组合，并给出数据驱动的最佳方案。对于中小企业和营销人员来说，Loova 相当于一个无需高超设计技能的独立广告优化师。
digest_items.summary_en: Loova Ads Studio is an AI-powered ad creation tool that goes beyond aesthetics to optimize for conversion. It automatically tests different copy, images, and audience segments, then recommends the highest-performing combination. Small businesses and marketers benefit most, as Loova acts like a dedicated ad optimizer without requiring design expertise, helping them achieve better ROI with less effort.

digest_items.title: Nautis
digest_items.description: The AI-native Operating System for founders.
digest_items.summary_zh: Nautis 是专为创业者打造的 AI 原生操作系统，整合了项目管理、客户关系、财务跟踪等核心功能，并利用AI自动生成洞察和下一步建议。它的核心价值在于让创始人从繁琐的行政事务中解放出来，更专注于战略决策。早期创业团队尤其需要这样一个统一的大脑。
digest_items.summary_en: Nautis is an AI-native operating system designed specifically for founders, integrating project management, CRM, financial tracking, and more. Its AI generates insights and suggests next steps automatically, freeing founders from administrative overhead so they can focus on strategy. Early-stage startup teams benefit most, as Nautis becomes the single brain that keeps everything aligned and actionable.

digest_items.title: Lev8
digest_items.description: Find, research, and reach the right people
digest_items.summary_zh: Lev8是一个线索挖掘与联系人发现工具，帮助销售、招聘和市场人员精准找到目标人群，并快速获取其联系方式及背景信息。它整合了多渠道数据透视，减少手动搜索时间，特别适合B2B获客或高管招聘场景。
digest_items.summary_en: Lev8 is a lead generation and contact discovery tool that helps sales, recruitment, and marketing professionals precisely find target people and quickly obtain their contact info and background. It integrates multi-channel data profiling to reduce manual search time, making it especially useful for B2B prospecting or executive recruiting.

digest_items.title: Replay QA
digest_items.description: Replay QA tells you what is broken before your users do
digest_items.summary_zh: Replay QA 是一款智能质量监控工具，通过记录用户操作回放并自动分析异常行为，能在用户报告之前提前发现产品缺陷。它的核心价值在于从被动响应转向主动预防，极大减少线上事故对用户的伤害。对于开发和QA团队来说，Replay QA 就像一名24小时巡逻的哨兵，让问题无处遁形。
digest_items.summary_en: Replay QA is an intelligent quality monitoring tool that records user session replays and automatically analyzes them for anomalies, catching bugs before users report them. It shifts the approach from reactive firefighting to proactive prevention, reducing the impact of issues on customers. Development and QA teams benefit most, as Replay QA acts like a round-the-clock sentinel, ensuring problems are spotted and fixed early.

digest_items.title: Spycost
digest_items.description: Fell for a discount again?
digest_items.summary_zh: Spycost是一款价格监控与折扣真实性验证工具，专门帮助消费者识别电商平台上是否真的得到了优惠。用户只需粘贴商品链接，Spycost就会追踪该商品的历史价格走势，用图表展示最低价、平均价和当前价，并标记出虚假的“原价”和虚构的折扣幅度。对于经常网购、容易在“限时特价”中冲动的消费者而言，Spycost让他们在剁手前能看清商品的实际价值，避免被营销噱头欺骗，从而做出更理性的购买决策。
digest_items.summary_en: Spycost is a price-tracking and discount verification tool that helps shoppers determine whether a sale is genuine. By simply pasting a product URL, it displays the item's historical price chart, showing the lowest, average, and current prices, and flags inflated original prices and fake discount percentages. For frequent online shoppers who often fall for limited-time deals, Spycost provides transparency before checkout, revealing the true value of a product and preventing impulse buys driven by marketing gimmicks. It empowers consumers to make smarter, more rational purchasing decisions by cutting through the noise of deceptive pricing tactics.

digest_items.title: CartAI
digest_items.description: The AI agent that handles checkout.
digest_items.summary_zh: CartAI是一个AI购物助手，能够自动完成电商网站上的结账流程，包括填写地址、选择支付方式等。它解决了手动重复填表的痛点，适合经常网购或抢购限量商品的用户，也适用于开发者测试结账环节。
digest_items.summary_en: CartAI is an AI agent that automates the checkout process on e-commerce sites, handling address entry, payment selection, and more. It solves the pain point of repetitive manual form filling, making it ideal for frequent online shoppers or those racing for limited-edition items, as well as developers testing checkout flows.

digest_items.title: ditto.site
digest_items.description: Clone any website into clean code. Free & open source
digest_items.summary_zh: ditto.site是一款免费开源工具，能够将任意网站克隆为整洁、可编辑的HTML/CSS代码。它一键抓取页面结构并去除了冗余脚本，适合前端开发者快速获取参考布局或设计师提取灵感。完全开源且无需注册。
digest_items.summary_en: ditto.site is a free, open-source tool that clones any website into clean, editable HTML and CSS code. It captures the page structure with one click and strips out redundant scripts, making it handy for front-end developers to obtain reference layouts or for designers to extract inspiration. It's fully open source and requires no sign-up.

digest_items.title: Skippr AI
digest_items.description: The live AI employee inside your product, serving every user
digest_items.summary_zh: Skippr AI 是一个实时AI员工，嵌入在你的产品中，为每一位用户提供即时服务。它解决了传统客服或支持团队响应慢、人力成本高的问题，让产品自身具备对话式助手能力。无论是解答用户疑问、引导操作还是收集反馈，Skippr都能像真实员工一样自然交互。对于SaaS产品、电商平台或任何需要用户引导和客户支持的应用，它都能显著提升用户体验和运营效率。
digest_items.summary_en: Skippr AI is a live AI employee that lives inside your product, serving every user in real time. It solves the problem of slow customer support and high labor costs by turning your product itself into a conversational assistant. Whether answering questions, guiding users, or collecting feedback, Skippr interacts naturally like a real team member. For SaaS products, e-commerce platforms, or any app requiring user guidance and support, it dramatically improves user experience and operational efficiency.

digest_items.title: Codex 穷鬼大救星
digest_items.description: 穷则思变，富则...算了，富哥就不用看这篇文章了！ 为了守护我们钱包，这套穷鬼工作流横空出世！ 欢迎来到 AI 黑心包工队！
digest_items.summary_zh: 这篇文章介绍了一套名为“穷鬼工作流”的AI编程方案，旨在帮助预算有限的开发者利用Codex等工具低成本完成项目。作者以幽默自嘲的口吻，将这套方案比作“AI黑心包工队”，强调其核心价值是让手头拮据的程序员也能享受AI带来的效率提升，而不必购买昂贵的付费服务。对于个人开发者和小团队尤其实用。
digest_items.summary_en: This article introduces a budget-friendly AI coding workflow called "Poor Guy Workflow," aimed at helping developers with limited funds leverage tools like Codex to complete projects at low cost. The author humorously dubs it an "AI shady contractor team," emphasizing that it allows coders on a tight budget to enjoy AI efficiency boosts without expensive subscriptions. It's especially practical for indie developers and small teams.

digest_items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
digest_items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
digest_items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
digest_items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

digest_items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
digest_items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
digest_items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
digest_items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

digest_items.title: 写给年轻程序员的几点建议-2
digest_items.description: 现在互联网红利已经消失了，深知年轻程序员的不易，下面就浅薄地谈几点建议。中国人口基数比较大，要培养自己的 商业嗅觉。你能卖爆一个商品，就能获得巨大的财富。微信公众号如果能写出 几万 浏览量的文章，就有
digest_items.summary_zh: 作者针对互联网红利消退的现状，向年轻程序员提出培养商业嗅觉和写作能力的建议。他认为在中国庞大的人口基数下，能卖爆一个商品或写出高阅读量的公众号文章就能获得巨大财富。文章强调技术之外的市场认知和内容表达能力同样重要，适合处于职业早期的程序员思考如何拓宽收入来源。
digest_items.summary_en: The author offers advice for young programmers in the post-internet-bonus era, emphasizing the need to develop business acumen and writing skills. Given China's huge population, successfully selling a product or writing a viral WeChat article can bring significant wealth. The article argues that market insight and content communication are as crucial as technical skills, making it relevant for early-career programmers looking to diversify their income streams.

digest_items.title: 最近公司烧token比招员工还贵，老板干懵了...
digest_items.description: 如题。 这真的没在开玩笑。 这也是最近不少公司，在大力、甚至全面拥抱 AI 之后所发出的切实吐槽。 一个月前，Uber 的 CTO 曾对外透露，公司自部署 CC 以来，内部有超 9 成的工程师在高频率
digest_items.summary_zh: 这不是段子，是真实发生在许多公司里的窘境。随着全面拥抱AI，员工高频调用大模型API，公司的token消耗费用竟然超过了招聘新员工的成本。Uber的CTO曾透露，内部有超过九成的工程师在频繁使用AI服务。老板们面对账单直呼头疼：本来是降本增效的AI，怎么成了新的烧钱黑洞？
digest_items.summary_en: This isn't a joke—it's a real dilemma many companies are facing. After wholeheartedly adopting AI, their token usage costs have actually surpassed the expense of hiring new employees. Uber's CTO revealed that over 90% of their engineers are using AI services heavily. Bosses are staring at the bills in shock: the technology that was supposed to reduce costs and boost efficiency has instead become a new money-burning black hole.

digest_items.title: 停更的这一年，All In AI、陪媳妇生娃、还考了个研
digest_items.description: 停更的这一年，All In AI、陪媳妇生娃、还考了个研 打开掘金 App，看了一眼自己的最近更新——停在了整整一年前。 不是不想写，是这一年确实被塞得太满了。如果非要用几个关键词来概括，那就是： A
digest_items.summary_zh: 一位掘金作者停更一年后回归，分享了这段时间的密集经历：全力投入 AI 领域、陪伴妻子生娃、还抽空考了个研。文章以第一人称讲述了如何平衡工作、家庭与个人提升，展现了技术人在生活重大节点上的真实抉择。对面临类似境遇的读者来说，这是一个关于如何在巨大压力下仍坚持成长的真实故事。
digest_items.summary_en: A Juejin author returns after a year-long hiatus, recounting a whirlwind period of diving headfirst into AI, supporting his wife through childbirth, and even squeezing in graduate school exams. Through first-person narration, he shares how he balanced career, family, and personal growth, offering a relatable and inspiring tale for developers navigating life’s major milestones while striving to keep improving.

digest_items.title: 2026编程圈很火的10个Skills
digest_items.description: 前言 最近编程圈最火的一个词，非 Skills 莫属。 不是指程序员的技术能力，而是指 AI 编程助手的“技能包” 。 一套让 AI 从“随缘写代码”变成“按流程交付”的标准化工作流模块。 今天这篇文
digest_items.summary_zh: 2026 年编程圈热议的 10 个 Skills 并非指程序员的技术能力，而是 AI 编程助手的“技能包”——一套标准化工作流模块，让 AI 从随缘写代码变为按流程交付。这些技能包覆盖代码审查、测试生成、文档编写等环节，旨在提升开发效率和代码质量。对正在探索 AI 辅助编程的团队和个人开发者而言，掌握这些技能包将成为提高生产力的关键。
digest_items.summary_en: The 10 hottest Skills in programming circles for 2026 refer not to developers' own abilities but to standardized workflow modules for AI coding assistants. These skill packages transform AI from random code generation to structured delivery, covering code review, test generation, documentation, and more. For teams and individual developers exploring AI-assisted programming, mastering these skills is becoming essential for boosting productivity and code quality.

digest_items.title: Kimi k3是真碉，但太不经用，也有拉跨点！
digest_items.description: K3 已测，确实强，但要命的是配额太少了！ 一天不到，一周的配额已经烧完了，大概就生成了 5 个测试页面！ 从五个例子中，可以知道，有些确实很强，有些呢又差点意思，有些比较糟糕。 我不是那种收钱办事儿
digest_items.summary_zh: Kimi 的 K3 模型实测表现确实强悍，但致命缺陷是配额太少，一周的额度在一天内就用完了，只生成了五个测试页面。从这几个例子看，有的生成效果很棒，有的却不尽如人意，甚至有些糟糕。作者强调自己并非收钱办事，而是真实体验，这让 K3 的实际可用性打了折扣。
digest_items.summary_en: The author tested Kimi's K3 model and found it genuinely powerful, but the critical issue is its extremely limited quota. A week's worth of quota was exhausted in just one day, allowing only five test page generations. Among the examples, some results were impressive while others were disappointing or even poor. The author stresses this is an unbiased review, highlighting that K3, despite its strength, suffers from severe availability constraints that undermine its practical use.

digest_items.title: Kimi 停售，GLM限购，国内用户还是难啊！
digest_items.description: 昨天还在疯狂测试 Kimi K3，今天就听说停售了~~ K3 确实也是火了，火遍大江南北寰宇内外，火到直接停售了，之前 GLM 5.2 火了之后也是一直限购状态，你说国外的抢不到也就算了，现在国内的也
digest_items.summary_zh: 昨天还在疯狂测试 Kimi K3，今天就听说它停售了。K3 火爆到全球关注，结果直接停售，此前的 GLM 5.2 也是因太火而一直限购。这让人感叹，国外的大模型抢不到就算了，现在国内热门的模型也如此难获取，国内用户想用好模型实在太难了。
digest_items.summary_en: Just yesterday the author was busy testing Kimi K3, and today news broke that it has been discontinued for sale. K3 became so popular globally that sales were halted, similar to the earlier GLM 5.2 which also remained under purchase restrictions due to high demand. This situation highlights the difficulty domestic users face in accessing hot AI models—it's not just foreign models that are hard to get, but now even domestic ones are equally elusive.

digest_items.title: 网友发现很多 KTV 都没有 MV 了，全是奇怪的 AI 画面，为什么会这样？你有遇到这种情况吗？
digest_items.summary_zh: 有网友发现现在很多 KTV 的屏幕上不再是传统 MV，而是充斥着由 AI 生成的奇怪画面。这种现象引发了广泛讨论，大家好奇为什么会发生这样的变化，以及 AI 画面是否影响了唱歌体验。这背后可能涉及版权成本、内容制作效率以及 KTV 行业的数字化转型趋势。
digest_items.summary_en: A netizen noticed that many KTV rooms now play bizarre AI-generated visuals instead of traditional music videos, sparking discussions about why this change is happening and how it affects the singing experience. The shift likely relates to copyright costs, content production efficiency, and the digital transformation trend in the KTV industry. This phenomenon raises questions about the balance between technology convenience and user experience in entertainment venues.

digest_items.title: 如何看待申真谞二比一战胜围棋人工智能「KataGo」？
digest_items.summary_zh: 围棋顶尖棋手申真谞以二比一的比分击败了围棋人工智能 KataGo，这一结果引发了热议。虽然 KataGo 并不像 AlphaGo 那样顶尖，但人类棋手能在让先或特定条件下战胜 AI，仍然展示了人类智慧与 AI 博弈的微妙之处。这场胜利是否说明人类仍有突破口，还是暴露了 AI 的局限性，值得深思。
digest_items.summary_en: Top Go player Shin Jin-seo defeated the Go AI KataGo with a 2–1 score, sparking heated discussion. While KataGo is not as dominant as AlphaGo, a human victory under handicap or specific conditions still demonstrates the subtle interplay between human intuition and AI calculation. This outcome raises questions about whether humans can still find breakthroughs against AI or if it reveals limitations in current Go AI systems, offering valuable insights for the ongoing human-AI competition.

digest_items.title: Kimi 新模型 K3 跑分力压 ClaudeFable5 登顶，这将对大模型市场格局产生哪些影响？
digest_items.summary_zh: Kimi 的新模型 K3 在跑分上力压 Claude Fable 5 登顶排行榜，这无疑将对大模型市场格局产生重大影响。K3 的强势表现意味着国产模型在技术实力上迈上了新台阶，可能改变行业竞争态势，促使其他厂商加速迭代。但跑分能否转化为实际应用优势，还有待观察。
digest_items.summary_en: Kimi's new model K3 has topped the benchmark rankings, surpassing Claude Fable 5, which is set to significantly impact the landscape of large language models. This achievement signals that domestic models have reached a new level of technical prowess, potentially reshaping industry competition and pushing other developers to accelerate their iterations. However, whether the benchmark success will translate into real-world application advantages remains to be seen, as the gap between rankings and practical utility is still a key consideration.

digest_items.title: 情侣用 AI 判断菌子毒性采了 10 余斤，被本地小孩哥筛选只剩 2 斤，AI 和小孩哥谁的判断更准？为啥会有不同？
digest_items.summary_zh: 一对情侣用AI识别野生菌毒性，兴致勃勃采了十多斤，结果被当地小孩哥“火眼金睛”筛选后只剩两斤可食用。这有趣的一幕背后，折射出AI在特定场景下的局限性：AI基于图片与数据库比对，但野生菌外观相似、变异大，而小孩哥依靠的是当地世代相传的经验，对细微气味、质地甚至生长环境都了如指掌。对于经常户外野采或依赖AI识别的人而言，这提醒我们：AI是工具，但绝不能替代真实世界的经验鉴别，尤其涉及生命安全时，本地知识往往更可靠。
digest_items.summary_en: A couple used AI to identify poisonous mushrooms and proudly collected over ten pounds, only to have a local child winnow them down to just two pounds of safe-to-eat ones. This charming incident highlights a critical gap: AI mushrooms identification relies on image databases and struggles with visual variants, while the child's knowledge comes from generations of hands-on local wisdom about smell, texture, and habitat. For outdoor enthusiasts and AI-reliant novices, the takeaway is clear—AI is a handy assistant, but when safety is at stake, nothing beats human expertise passed down through local experience.

digest_items.title: 怎么看谷歌发布了 Gemini 3.6 flash 和 3.5 lite，但是 pro 又缺席？
digest_items.summary_zh: 谷歌最新发布了两款Gemini模型：3.6 flash注重快速推理与低成本，适合实时应用；3.5 lite则是轻量版，面向边缘设备。但备受期待的Pro版本再次缺席，让人不禁疑惑。从战略上看，谷歌似乎在有意拉开产品线：先用flash抢占高频、低延迟场景（如聊天机器人），再用lite覆盖手机、IoT等端侧需求，而Pro作为旗舰级模型，可能还在打磨或等待更好的发布时机。对于开发者来说，这意味着可以先用这些特化版本做产品原型，但追求顶尖推理能力的用户还需再等等。
digest_items.summary_en: Google quietly launched two new Gemini models: 3.6 Flash, optimized for fast inference and low cost, and 3.5 Lite, a lightweight variant for edge devices. But the Pro model is again missing, raising eyebrows. Strategically, Google seems to be segmenting its lineup—Flash targets real-time chat and high-frequency tasks, while Lite fits mobile and IoT. Pro, the flagship, may still be in refinement or awaiting a bigger launch window. For developers, this means practical tools for prototyping are here, but those seeking state-of-the-art reasoning power will have to wait longer.

digest_items.title: Claude Fable 5 正式退出 Pro 订阅，但是保留了 Max ，这是为什么？
digest_items.summary_zh: Anthropic的Claude Fable 5最近从Pro订阅计划中撤出，仅保留在更昂贵的Max计划中。这一调整看似突然，实则合情理：Fable 5作为创意写作专长模型，其高计算成本使其难以在月费20美元的Pro计划中盈利。保留Max用户独享，既能维持高质量服务，又符合高端用户的付费意愿。对普通Pro用户而言，虽少了这个“作家助手”，但Claude的核心能力依然可用；而对专业创作者或企业来说，Fable 5的价值在于它几乎能写出媲美人类的小说段落，贵有贵的道理。
digest_items.summary_en: Anthropic has quietly removed Claude Fable 5 from its Pro subscription, making it exclusive to the pricier Max plan. Behind this move is simple economics: Fable 5, a model specialized for creative writing, is computationally expensive to run, and the $20/month Pro tier couldn't sustain it profitably. By keeping it in Max, Anthropic ensures the model's quality while aligning with high-paying users' expectations. For regular Pro subscribers, it's a loss of a unique writer's assistant, but core Claude capabilities remain. For serious novelists and content studios, Fable 5's ability to craft human-like prose justifies the upgrade.

digest_items.title: Linux 中「一切皆文件」是什么意思？
digest_items.summary_zh: “一切皆文件”是Linux的设计哲学，意思是系统把设备、进程、网络连接等几乎所有资源都抽象成文件接口。比如键盘、硬盘、打印机，你都可以用读写文件的方式去操作它们：打开、读取、写入、关闭。这大大简化了编程模型，让统通用工具（如cat、grep、重定向）就能处理各种资源。对于新手，理解这个理念是掌握Linux终端的钥匙；对于开发者，这意味着可以用统一API操作硬件与系统，降低开发复杂度。简单来说，就是“万物皆可当作文件来玩”。
digest_items.summary_en: In Linux, 'everything is a file' is a core philosophy that treats almost any system resource—devices, processes, sockets, even kernel data—as if they were regular files. This means you can open a keyboard, read from a microphone, or write to a hard drive using the same read/write/close operations you'd use on a text file. It massively simplifies programming: common tools like cat, grep, or redirection work on all sorts of resources. For beginners, grasping this unlocks the true power of the command line. For developers, it reduces complexity by providing a uniform API to interact with hardware and system internals. Essentially, it turns everything into something you can 'play with like a file'.
